description.overview: An ancient African sighthound bred by nomads, the Azawakh is elegant yet rugged. They're deeply loyal to their families but aloof with strangers.
description.history: The Azawakh originated in West Africa (Mali, Niger, Burkina Faso).
description.temperament: Known for being aloof, attentive, loyal.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, fine coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient African sighthound bred by nomads, the Azawakh is elegant yet rugged. They're deeply loyal to their families but aloof with strangers.
